intro.heading: The story of Palace Roszkowice
intro.paragraph1: The history of Palace Roszkowice dates back to the 19th century, when the residence was built as the seat of a local noble family. For decades, the palace served as the centre of social and cultural life in the surrounding lands.
intro.paragraph2: During its prosperous years, the estate was surrounded by an extensive landscape park, and the palace hosted members of neighbouring families and was a vibrant social gathering place.

period1.title: Construction of the palace
period1.description: A manor residence built as a family seat, surrounded by a landscape park.

period2.title: Post-war changes
period2.description: After the war the palace changed functions — it served as a state farm headquarters and gradually fell into disrepair.

period3.title: Restoration and renovation
period3.description: Renovation work has begun to restore the palace to its former glory and open it to visitors.
